sqlMap.sql: select c1.cabinet_id as cabinet_id, case when #primary# = '1' then c1.cabinet_name1 else c1.cabinet_name2 end as cabinet_name, c1.cabinet_name1 as cabinet_name1, c1.cabinet_name2 as cabinet_name2, c1.cabinet_level as cabinet_level, c1.cabinet_step as cabinet_step, case when (select count(c2.cabinet_id) from tbl_cabinet_cabinet c2 where c2.use_status = 1 and c1.cabinet_id = c2.parent_id and c1.company_id = c2.company_id and c1.tenant_id = c2.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub
sqlMap.select:
select c.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then c.displayname else c.displayname2 end as dept_name, c.level as dept_level, c.has_sub as has_sub from ( select b.*, case when (select count(d.cn) from tbl_deptmaster d where b.cn = d.extensionattribute1 and b.tenant_id = d.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub, #level# as dept_level from tbl_deptmaster b where b.cn = #companyId# and b.tenant_id = #tenantId#
union
select a.*, case when (select count(e.cn) from tbl_deptmaster e where a.cn = e.extensionattribute1 and e.cn <> e.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = e.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub, (#level# + 1) as dept_level from tbl_deptmaster a where a.extensionattribute1 = #companyId# and a.cn <> a.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c order by dept_level, lpad(ifnull(extensionattribute15, 0), 6, 0), displayname
select dept_cd_path from tbl_deptmaster where cn = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.cn = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and b.cn <> b.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.extensionattribute1 = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.cn <> a.extensionattribute2 order by lpad(ifnull(a.extensionattribute15, 0), 6, 0), a.displayname
select * from tbl_cabinet_admin_modules where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and active_status = 1 order by module_type desc
select * from tbl_cabinet_user_modules where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by module_type desc

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, user_id, module_type from tbl_cabinet_user_modules where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and module_type = #moduleType# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cabinet_user_modules (user_id, company_id, module_type, active_status, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #companyId#, #moduleType#, #activeStatus#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_cabinet_user_modules set active_status = #activeStatus# where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and module_type = #moduleType# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: select * from tbl_cabinet_config where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, user_id from tbl_cabinet_config where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cabinet_config (user_id, company_id, list_count, preview_mode, content_wpercent, content_hpercent, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #companyId#, #listCount#, #prevMode#, #contentWPrev#, #contentHPrev#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_cabinet_config set preview_mode = #prevMode#, list_count = #listCount#, content_wpercent = #contentWPrev#, content_hpercent = #contentHPrev# where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: select ifnull(max(cabinet_id), 0) from tbl_cabinet_cabinet where tenant_id = #tenantId#
select ifnull(max(cabinet_step), 0) from tbl_cabinet_cabinet where parent_id = #cabinetId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select * from tbl_cabinet_cabinet where cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_cabinet_cabinet ( cabinet_id, cabinet_name1, cabinet_name2, creator_id, creator_name1, creator_name2, department_id, department_name1, department_name2, cabinet_type, parent_id, cabinet_path, cabinet_step, cabinet_level, created_date, updated_date, update_id, deleter_id, use_status, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #cabinetId#, #cabinetName1#, #cabinetName2#, #creatorId#, #creatorName1#, #creatorName2#, #departmentId#, #departmentName1#, #departmentName2#, #cabinetType#, #parentId#, #cabinetPath#, #cabinetStep#, #cabinetLevel#, #createdDate#, #updatedDate#, #updateId#, #deleterId#, #useStatus#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.update: update tbl_cabinet_cabinet set cabinet_name1 = #cabinetName1#, cabinet_name2 = #cabinetName2#, creator_name1 = #creatorName1#, creator_name2 = #creatorName2#, department_id = #departmentId#, department_name1 = #departmentName1#, department_name2 = #departmentName2#, cabinet_type = #cabinetType#, parent_id = #parentId#, cabinet_path = #cabinetPath#, cabinet_step = #cabinetStep#, cabinet_level = #cabinetLevel#, created_date = #createdDate#, updated_date = #updatedDate#, update_id = #updateId#, deleter_id = #deleterId#, use_status = #useStatus#, company_id = #companyId# where cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
update tbl_cabinet_cabinet set use_status = 0, deleter_id = #userId#, updated_date = #timeUTC# where use_status = 1 and cabinet_path like concat(#cabinetPath#, '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId#

update tbl_cabinet_item i join ( select * from tbl_cabinet_cabinet where cabinet_path like concat(#cabinetPath#, '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c1 on i.cabinet_id = c1.cabinet_id and i.tenant_id = c1.tenant_id set i.use_status = 0, i.deleter_id = #userId#, i.updated_date = #timeUTC# where i.tenant_id = #tenantId# and i.use_status = 1
sqlMap.select: select * from tbl_cabinet_cabinet where parent_id = #parentId# and use_status = 1 and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by cabinet_level asc, cabinet_step asc
from tbl_cabinet_cabinet c1 where c1.creator_id = #userId# and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and c1.cabinet_level = 0 and c1.use_status = 1 and c1.cabinet_type = #type#
from tbl_cabinet_cabinet c1 where c1.parent_id = #cabinetId# and c1.company_id = #companyId# and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and c1.use_status = 1 order by c1.cabinet_step asc

from tbl_cabinet_cabinet c1 where ( (c1.parent_id in #listNodes[]#) or (c1.cabinet_id in #listNodes[]# and c1.parent_id = -1) ) and c1.company_id = #companyId# and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and c1.use_status = 1 order by c1.cabinet_level asc, c1.cabinet_step asc
sqlMap.update: update tbl_cabinet_cabinet set updated_date = #updateTime#, update_id = #userId#, cabinet_path = replace(cabinet_path, #oldPath#, #newPath#), cabinet_level = cabinet_level + #levelDistance# where cabinet_path like concat(concat(#oldPath#, '_'), '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
select c3.* from (
select * from tbl_cabinet_cabinet c1 where c1.cabinet_id in
#cabinetList[]#
and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId#
union select c2.* from tbl_cabinet_cabinet c2 join tbl_cabinet_item i on c2.cabinet_id = i.cabinet_id and c2.tenant_id = i.tenant_id where i.item_id in
#itemList[]#
and c2.tenant_id = #tenantId#
) c3

select d4.cn from ( select * from tbl_deptmaster d1 where d1.cn = #deptId# and d1.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select * from tbl_deptmaster d2 where d2.cn = #companyId# and d2.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select d3.* from tbl_deptmaster d3 join tbl_addjobmaster a on d3.cn = a.deptid and a.cn = #userId# and d3.tenant_id = a.tenant_id where d3.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) d4

select c3.* from ( select c1.*, s.sub_permission from tbl_cabinet_cabinet c1 join tbl_cabinet_share s on c1.cabinet_id = s.cabinet_id and c1.tenant_id = s.tenant_id where s.sharer_id in
#others[]#
and ( (s.shared_id = #userId# and s.shared_type = 2) or (s.shared_id in
#deptList[]# and (s.shared_type = 0 or s.shared_type = 1) ) ) and s.permission = 1 and s.use_status = 1 ) c3

select c1.cabinet_id from tbl_cabinet_cabinet c1 where
c1.cabinet_path like concat('%', concat(#pathList[]#, '%'))
